boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operations operator execute the industrial, utility, or safety-control action now? Focus: bypass left active.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact control record closes boundary for execution.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defects remain in source records.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: current restoration checklist and operations approval match

critical_features_preserved: current restoration checklist and operations approval match
final_answer: Action may proceed. The controlling control record confirms the required dependency is current and exact. The frozen Wave5 policy permits execution only when source records close the exact action boundary before proceeding. No open defects exist in the source records, and all required features are preserved.
